steps.title: Emphasize concrete size
steps.content: The student's goal is to emphasize the size of the sculpture. The most relevant note is that Rotate is roughly 6 feet wide and 12 feet tall, because measurements make size specific.

steps.title: Reject vague or irrelevant details
steps.content: A and C only call the sculptures large without giving measurements. B focuses on material rather than size. The best completion names Rotate and includes its width and height. The answer is D.
